# 2026-04-22 — Wednesday

Slept poorly. Two coffees before noon — regret.

Pushed the fix. Ran swift test twice to be sure.

Theo sent designs for the Before/After panel. They're right; my layout was overcomplicated.

Rolled back the xcodebuild change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Walked to Porto after lunch. Got a coffee at Hello Kristof. Thought about nothing.

Walked to Belém after lunch. Got a coffee at Dear Breakfast. Thought about nothing.

The privacy argument for on-device compute isn't about threats. It's about what kinds of products get to exist.

Half of "rewriting" is deleting.
